race.comment: POWER PLAN (5) is yet to strike but is building nicely and been finding the line well. Holder sticks for the well-acquainted Gluyas stable who will have this gelding at his top fourth-up. Suspect he's ready to run a big race. BREVITAS (7) brings the best local formlines. She was an eye-catcher in the G3 David Coles back in May and then turned the tables on the winner at her next start. Was ultimately left with too much to do last time but was strong late. Will likely get a long way back again from the wide draw and be saved for the final shot at them. EXPENSIVE TASTE (8) ran third in the G2 Sires' Produce at Flemington before spelling but couldn't meet firm market expectations when returning on the syntho last month. Can improve sharply with that run under her belt. BURNING HEARTZ (9) fought hard to get the bob for a debut win on the Lakeside. Worth following up. SPAIN (4) was well supported but found what looks a pretty smart one in Omolong. Interesting to see the stable come here.
